name: mojo-test-file-split
description: Split large Mojo test files exceeding ADR-009 fn test_ function limits to prevent heap corruption in Mojo v0.26.1 CI. Use when: (1) a test file has >10 fn test_ functions and causes intermittent libKGENCompilerRTShared.so JIT faults, (2) CI shows non-deterministic heap corruption failures on a specific test group, (3) ADR-009 compliance is required for a new or existing test file.
